title: Lightning Bolt Glass
description: Whenever lightning hits sand it turns into glass
body:
What is Lightning Bolt Glass? Whenever lightning hits sand it turns into glass. Supports data-driven fulgurites.

[![Sponsor](https://legopitstop.weebly.com/files/theme/banner_5.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/legopitstop)
Click on the above image, select your plan (at least 4GB), use code `legopitstop` to get 25% off your first month, and enjoy playing with your friends!

## Loaders
- [Datapack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/lightning-bolt-glass-datapack)
- **Fabric**

## Custom Fulgurites
See the [wiki](https://github.com/legopitstop/Fabric/wiki/Lightning_Bolt_Glass) for more information on how to create your own data-driven fulgurites.

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven
```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:lightning-bolt-glass:fabric-${project.lightningglass_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
